title: Better Hypixel Chat
description: A mod to fix Hypixel chat formatting on smaller chat widths and fonts. Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
A simple mod to fix Hypixel chat formatting on lower chat widths and different fonts. ## What this mod does: - Fix centered text.
- Smooth line for chat separations. ## Incompatibilities - Incompatible with Chat Patches' timestamps. - Hopefully no other
